context: Prevalence:   4.7÷1,000,000 live births Prognosis:   poor ← rapidly progressive course Age:   first 4-6 weeks of infancy Associated with:   congenital leukemia of Down syndrome (15-fold increase of leukemia) OB-US: √  hepatosplenomegaly → ↑ abdominal circumference √  hydrops ← fetal anemia / leukemic infiltrate of myocardium / visceral fibrosis with ↑ vascular resistance DDx:   infection, metastatic neuroblastoma
